title: Basic JavaScript Fetch API
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Fetch API. Focus on implementing fetch() function correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Fetch API
description: Create a function that uses fetch() function and Response object (json, text, blob) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Fetch API Project
description: Build a small application that applies fetch() function, Response object (json, text, blob), Request object in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Fetch API
description: The following code has bugs related to fetch() function. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Fetch API
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with fetch() function and Response object (json, text, blob).
